scripts.build: npm run build -w @meter-mcp/sdk && npm run build -w @meter-mcp/mcp && npm run build -w @meter-mcp/adapters && npm run build -w @meter-mcp/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @meter-mcp/sdk && npm run typecheck -w @meter-mcp/mcp && npm run typecheck -w @meter-mcp/adapters && npm run typecheck -w @meter-mcp/cli && npm run typecheck:examples
scripts.test: npm test -w @meter-mcp/sdk && npm test -w @meter-mcp/mcp && npm test -w @meter-mcp/adapters && npm test -w @meter-mcp/cli
scripts.lint:packages: publint packages/sdk && publint packages/mcp && publint packages/adapters && attw --pack packages/sdk && attw --pack packages/mcp && attw --pack packages/adapters && publint packages/cli && attw --pack packages/cli
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:packages && npm run verify:openapi && node scripts/verify-sdk-packages.mjs && npm run audit:release
